_comment: Morpho Blue corpus with semantically pinned Ethereum real transactions, fresh Etherscan V2 representatives from the 2026-06-02 adapter-blind singleton sweep, Base Dune direct-call representatives, Base hand/typed fixtures, and excluded-selector error cases.

transactions.intent: morpho Authorization grant (off-chain EIP-712, hand fixture)
